center.name: 比亞克島
center.summary: 比亞克島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Geelvink fruit dove、Red-fronted lorikeet、Biak myzomela等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is only found in Biak, Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was formerly considered a subspecies of the dusky myzomela ( Myzomela obscura), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. It is found in Biak

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to several islands, including Biak, Supiori, Numfor, and the smaller Padaido Islands, collectively known as the Schouten or Geelvink Islands, which lie north of New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden monarch (Carterornis chrysomela) is a species of passerine bird in the family Monarchidae found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern New Guinea and the island of Biak
